title: Infinite URL Spaces, Calendars, Facets, Sessions, and Budget Defense · Contract Lens: Soft Error Detection
summary: Calendar next links, faceted queries, session IDs, sort permutations, soft errors, and generated paths consume the crawl while each URL looks valid. Predict authorization, URL identity, runtime admission, Promise ownership, resource bounds, accessibility impact, failure, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the crawler ts soft error detection increment in URL-space trap classifier and containment policy. Learners progress through prediction, explici…
objectives: Classify soft 404, login, challenge, empty shell, redirect loop, and repeated-template responses using multiple signals.
Budget distinct keys, values, combinations, orderings, and per-template pages with stakeholder-approved exceptions.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

Real DNS, Fetch, streams, Cheerio, Playwright, axe-core, files, processes, packages, containers, assistive-technology review, load, legal review, restore, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Classify soft 404, login, challenge, empty shell, redirect loop, and repeated-template responses using multiple signals.

For Authorized site auditing and TypeScript Defend the Soft Error Detection model · Theory Soft Error D…, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: HTTP status alone identifies every error page.
